query: UPDATE agentSkills SET keywords = '天,日,天數,行程天數,旅遊天數', rules = '{"type":"duration","conditions":[{"min":1,"max":3,"label":"短天數"},{"min":4,"max":5,"label":"中天數"},{"min":6,"max":8,"label":"長天數"},{"min":9,"max":999,"label":"深度長天數"}]}' WHERE skillName = '天數標籤規則';
